CustomField.formula: IF( ISPICKVAL( Flag__c , "Red"),IMAGE( "/servlet/servlet.FileDownload?file=015b0000004a1JY", "RedFlag"), IF( ISPICKVAL( Flag__c , "Blue"),IMAGE( "/servlet/servlet.FileDownload?file=015b0000004a1Jd", "BlueFlag"), IF( ISPICKVAL( Flag__c , "Gray"),IMAGE( "/servlet/servlet.FileDownload?file=015b0000004a1Jx", "GrayFlag"), IF( ISPICKVAL( Flag__c , "Amber"),IMAGE( "/servlet/servlet.FileDownload?file=015b0000004a1Jn", "YellowFlag"),"" ))))
CustomField.label: Flag
